headline: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods Maintains Outperform on Chubb, Raises Price Target to $389
summary: Keefe, Bruyette & Woods  analyst Meyer Shields   maintains Chubb (NYSE:CB) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $374 to $389.
